metadata.description: Ceramic material items that drop as loot and reference ceramic properties.

items.name: Clay Pot
items.description: A simple clay vessel that can be broken down for crafting.

items.name: Terracotta Fragment
items.description: Fired red clay fragment with improved durability.

items.name: Stoneware Shard
items.description: Dense ceramic fragment from high-temperature firing.

items.name: Porcelain Piece
items.description: Refined white ceramic known for its strength and beauty.

items.name: Mystic Ceramic Shard
items.description: Magically infused ceramic that pulses with arcane energy.
